commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `src/gateway/server-channels.ts` to queue explicit starts after non-manual stop timeouts and expands `src/gateway/server-channels.test.ts` with channel lifecycle regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +37, Tests +183. Total +220 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main returns when a stale task is still tracked, while reload and health-monitor paths call start after non-manual stop timeouts. I did not run the tests because this review is read-only, but the added fixtures encode the failing lifecycle path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Protected maintainer handling and contributor-supplied real reload proof are still needed; I found no narrow code defect for an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(gateway): recover channels after reload stop timeout
target.body:
Summary:
- Recover channel restarts after a reload stop times out without leaving stale task handles behind.
- Defer timeout recovery to explicit restart callers so hot reload starts the post-reload channel implementation/config.
- Cover late worker exits, startup failures, manual cancellation, and manual start-after-timeout regressions.

Proof:
- Testbox tbx_01kswa1j5852611dv10n6kcs38: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/server-channels.test.ts --reporter=verbose` passed, 37 tests.
- Testbox tbx_01kswac9ss09tk6kn22zvkx4y5: `corepack pnpm check:changed` passed.
- Autoreview: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean; no accepted/actionable findings.
target.author: obviyus
